contract_notes: Use the existing public joint_life_table contract: a single default variant with an ordered array of objects containing owner_age, spouse_age, and distribution_period.
This entry covers Table II only. Do not duplicate uniform_lifetime_table or single_life_table rows in this pipeline output.
